codeReview.summary: The fix feature resolves the prior attribution failure by capturing the chart/history expectation refresh in a dedicated test-only commit. Commit `a6eebee` cleanly contains the `tests/app.test.ts` updates that were previously left uncommitted, and current HEAD remains reviewable because those expectation changes are now attributable to this feature commit rather than mixed into unrelated working-tree state.

summary: Pass: prior scrutiny failure is resolved. The `tests/app.test.ts` expectation refresh that was previously uncommitted is now committed in clean feature-scoped commit `a6eebee5b79bacd31e7432057f320ebb59b6a6f8`, and the diff shows only the intended chart/history assertion updates. Current HEAD is reviewable despite unrelated `.factory/...` and runtime-diagnostics working-tree changes because this feature's implementation is now fully attributable to the committed test-only diff.
